threejs-skill-router.rationale: Routing metadata does not author graphics; it is verified by route reachability, ambiguity checks, and forward tests.

threejs-camera-direction.rationale: The reviewed camera systems are transform, state, and lifecycle logic with exact constants and pseudocode; the author explicitly accepted prose-only coverage.

threejs-procedural-animation.rationale: The reviewed procedural motion systems are exact phase, frame, spring, and quaternion algorithms; the author explicitly accepted prose-only coverage.

threejs-procedural-fields.rationale: Coupled fields, masks, displacement, and procedural normals need inspectable shader implementation.

threejs-procedural-materials.rationale: Material identity must be demonstrated under real geometry and lighting, including coupled procedural channels.

threejs-procedural-geometry.rationale: Profile sweeps, branch rings, and semantic mesh compilation cannot be reconstructed reliably from prose alone.

threejs-procedural-vegetation.rationale: Growth hierarchy, branch topology, foliage normals, and rooted wind require runnable source-matched evidence.

threejs-procedural-architecture.rationale: Massing, exposed-edge analysis, façade grammar, semantic modules, and grouped mesh emission require implementation evidence.

threejs-procedural-planets.rationale: Spherical domain warping, geological bands, biome masks, and orbit-to-close shading require a runnable implementation.

threejs-spectral-ocean.rationale: Spectral synthesis, staged FFTs, derivatives, and persistent foam are implementation-critical.

threejs-water-optics.rationale: Shared wave displacement/normals and reflection/refraction/absorption coupling require runnable shader evidence.

threejs-atmosphere-aerial-perspective.rationale: Sky, shell, and surface-segment scattering must be visibly coupled to the same atmosphere parameters.

threejs-volumetric-clouds.rationale: Density shaping, bounded integration, lighting, reconstruction, and shadows require runnable shader evidence.

threejs-raymarched-space-effects.rationale: Numerical curved-ray integration and volumetric disk accumulation require inspectable implementation.

threejs-procedural-vfx.rationale: Layered shells, wakes, sparks, pooling, and HDR contribution hierarchy require runnable evidence.

threejs-temporal-surfaces.rationale: Ping-pong history, reduced blur, static structure, and two-scale refraction are implementation-critical.

threejs-shadow-systems.rationale: Clipmap coverage, texel snapping, cache state, cross-fades, and invalidation need a visible inspection surface.

threejs-screen-space-ambient-occlusion.rationale: The source extraction contains exact buffer contracts, equations, sampling, reconstruction, and diagnostics; the author accepted practical post-processing references without mandatory standalone examples.

threejs-bloom.rationale: Selective contribution ownership and guaranteed material restoration are exercised by the sculpted gallery-frame example.

threejs-exposure-color-grading.rationale: The reviewed post path is fully specified as meter dimensions, encoding, readback, adaptation constants, tone-map ownership, LUT generation, and diagnostics.

threejs-image-pipeline.rationale: This skill owns signal contracts and ordering across atomic effects; practical pass graphs and ownership tables are the directly applicable artifact.

threejs-visual-validation.rationale: The repository gallery, deterministic capture workflow, diagnostics, metrics, and smoke tests are the executable implementation of this skill.
